mapper.insert: INSERT INTO places ( id, place_id, cid, data_id, input_id, title, place_group, category, address, destinations, latitude, longitude, plus_code, timezone, phone, website, google_maps_link, review_count, review_rating, reviews_per_rating, thumbnail, images, descriptions, status, price_range, open_hours, visit_duration_minutes, popular_times, reservations, order_online, menu, complete_address, about, owner, emails, raw_data, avg_authenticity_score, place_overall_score, adjusted_rating, trust_level, is_jcurve_detected, is_spike_detected, authentic_low_star_count, score_calculated_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{placeId}, #{cid}, #{dataId}, #{inputId}, #{title}, #{placeGroup,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{category}, #{address}, #{destinations}::jsonb, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{plusCode}, #{timezone}, #{phone}, #{website}, #{googleMapsLink}, #{reviewCount}, #{reviewRating}, #{reviewsPerRating}, #{thumbnail}, #{images}, #{descriptions}, #{status}, #{priceRange}, #{openHours}, #{visitDurationMinutes}, #{popularTimes}, #{reservations}, #{orderOnline}, #{menu}, #{completeAddress}, #{about}, #{owner}, #{emails}, #{rawData}, #{avgAuthenticityScore}, #{placeOverallScore}, #{adjustedRating}, #{trustLevel,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{isJcurveDetected}, #{isSpikeDetected}, #{authenticLowStarCount}, #{scoreCalculatedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE places SET title = #{title}, place_group = #{placeGroup,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, category = #{category}, address = #{address}, destinations = #{destinations}::jsonb, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, plus_code = #{plusCode}, timezone = #{timezone}, phone = #{phone}, website = #{website}, google_maps_link = #{googleMapsLink}, review_count = #{reviewCount}, review_rating = #{reviewRating}, reviews_per_rating = #{reviewsPerRating}, thumbnail = #{thumbnail}, images = #{images}, descriptions = #{descriptions}, status = #{status}, price_range = #{priceRange}, open_hours = #{openHours}, visit_duration_minutes = #{visitDurationMinutes}, popular_times = #{popularTimes}, reservations = #{reservations}, order_online = #{orderOnline}, menu = #{menu}, complete_address = #{completeAddress}, about = #{about}, owner = #{owner}, emails = #{emails}, raw_data = #{rawData}, avg_authenticity_score = #{avgAuthenticityScore}, place_overall_score = #{placeOverallScore}, adjusted_rating = #{adjustedRating}, trust_level = #{trustLevel,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, is_jcurve_detected = #{isJcurveDetected}, is_spike_detected = #{isSpikeDetected}, authentic_low_star_count = #{authenticLowStarCount}, score_calculated_at = #{scoreCalculatedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM places ORDER BY created_at DESC
